title: Amaary's Vibrancy Mod
description:
Makes your game look more vibrant (customizable).
Press o for the hud.
body:
Plain and simple makes your game look better, press o to adjust the vibrancy values.







![Before The Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5cff46f45fc0a8fcb54c79e8d4b43ae76b651384.png)![After the mod (30 percent power)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba705269e3eaf70ee9a765015aa254f11ea716b5.png)![After the mod (100 percent power)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5811849f417c81864b37b4937843161168fbb8ed.png)![Hud (press o)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76f34e73816be72854a6e24ecbd7d3c450456489.png)
